name: settlegrid-discovery
description: Search, browse, and invoke 1,444+ AI tools across 24 categories through a single MCP connection. Covers MCP servers, REST APIs, AI models, agent tools, and SDK packages with per-call billing.

tools.name: search_tools
tools.description: Search the SettleGrid marketplace for AI tools by keyword, category, price, or rating.

tools.name: get_tool
tools.description: Retrieve full details for a specific tool by its slug, including pricing, reviews, and quick-start code.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all available tool categories on the marketplace with tool counts.

tools.name: get_developer
tools.description: Get a developer's public profile, reputation score, and published tools.

tools.name: list_marketplace_tools
tools.description: Browse popular marketplace tools with cost-per-call and availability info.

tools.name: call_tool
tools.description: Invoke any marketplace tool by slug. Free tools work without a key; paid tools require an API key.
